heroHeadline: Kyiv: Russian Satellites Targeting Iran; 32 Indians Confirmed Killed Fighting for Russia
heroSubtitle: Ukraine intelligence reveals Russian satellite targeting assistance to Iran, as India confirms 32 nationals killed fighting for Russian army in a major diplomatic incident
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
